This is great news for female athletes, and Nebraska has been ahead of the game in preventing biological males from competing in girls’ sports. This decision refocuses Title IX to its original purpose: create a fair playing field for girls to achieve excellence in athletics.

Leading up to America’s 250th birthday, I asked Nebraskans what they love most about our country. 

Over the next few days, I will be sharing their responses. 

Today, we feature submissions from Omaha, North Platte, and Sidney. 

I hope you will follow along! https://t.co/vTTvIS0sWO
